about_info.title: About TractorWalla
about_info.description:
TractorWalla is your one-stop digital solution for all tractor-related needs. We are dedicated to making tractor buying, servicing, and maintenance simple, affordable, and accessible for everyone—especially farmers and tractor owners.

At TractorWalla, we understand how important tractors are in daily agricultural work. That's why we have built a platform where you can buy tractors, book services, and purchase spare parts—all in one place.
features: Wide range of tractors & spare parts
Complete tractor solution in one app

faq_data.question: How can I book a tractor service?
faq_data.answer: You can easily book a service by selecting your tractor type, choosing the required service and confirming your booking.

faq_data.question: What types of services are available?
faq_data.answer: We offer basic servicing, advanced repair, emergency breakdown support, and part replacement services.

faq_data.question: Can I track my service status?
faq_data.answer:
Yes, you can track real-time status like:
• Accepted
• Mechanic on the way
• In progress
• Completed

faq_data.question: Can I cancel my booking?
faq_data.answer: Yes, you can cancel your booking anytime before the mechanic begins the service from your Bookings tab.

faq_data.question: How can I buy tractor parts?
faq_data.answer: Navigate to the Parts section in the app, browse through the catalog, and add the required parts to your cart.

faq_data.question: Are the parts genuine?
faq_data.answer: Yes, all parts sold on TractorWalla are 100% genuine and verified by original manufacturers.

faq_data.question: Can I buy both new and old tractors?
faq_data.answer: Yes, our platform connects buyers with certified sellers for both brand new and pre-owned tractors.

faq_data.question: Are old tractors verified?
faq_data.answer: All pre-owned tractors go through a multi-point inspection process before they are listed on our app.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect your profile details, saved addresses, tractor preferences, service history, and contact information to provide smooth booking and support.

sections.title: Location Usage
sections.content: Your live location is used only to connect you with nearby service engineers, suppliers, and accurate service availability.

sections.title: Document Safety
sections.content: Your OTP, booking history, saved vehicles, and service details are securely stored for faster and safer future bookings.

sections.title: Payment Security
sections.content: Your wallet, refunds, and transaction details are encrypted and protected for secure payments.

points: By using TractorWalla, customers agree to provide accurate service details, tractor model information, and location data.
Booking cancellations after mechanic assignment may affect service priority and availability.
Payments, refunds, and support requests are managed according to TractorWalla's service policies.
